title: Angiolini Inquiry part 2 first report
body: "The Angiolini Inquiry was established to investigate the murder of Sarah Everard by an off-duty police officer.  The part 1 report covers the career and conduct of the murderer.  Part 2 of the inquiry is to:   establish if there is a risk of recurrence across policing investigate police culture address broader concerns around women’s safety in public spaces    For accessibility information, read the Angiolini Inquiry accessibility statement.  "
